topic: CP trajectory for Democrats House control question
summary: CP has been locked at 8-9% for 73+ days with downward long-term trend. Currently exactly at 0.09. Threshold is strictly > 9.00%.
content:
CP History Summary:
- Mar 2025: Started ~25%, quickly dropped to 10-15%
- Apr-Jul 2025: Stable at 15-18%
- Aug-Sep 2025: Dropped to 13-14%
- Oct 2025: Dropped to 10%, then 8%
- Nov 2025-Jan 2026: Oscillating between 8% and 9%
- Most recent (Jan 3, 2026): 0.09

Key stats: 22 forecasters, ~0.15 updates/day, no observed transition from 9% to above 9% in recent data.
Republicans hold the House majority. No realistic path for Democrats to gain control before Jan 3, 2027 through vacancies/special elections alone.
